info.description: MeshCore network observation backend. Ingests LoRa packets from MQTT brokers, stores in PostgreSQL, and streams live events via WebSocket.
info.title: MeshCore Tower API

isHashtag.description: true if derived from a hashtag PSK

keyKnown.description: true if Tower has a decryption key

name.description: display name, nil if not set

lastAdvertAt.description: epoch ms, nil if no advert received

brokers.description: broker names this observer has been seen on

lastPacketAt.description: epoch ms, last packet received via this broker; 0 if none

lastSeenAt.description: epoch ms, last time observer was seen on this broker

tags.description: Airport/location codes that group observers and packets
tags.name: IATAs
